title: Let's have a cup of doodh patti chai

title_lang.en: Let's have a cup of doodh patti chai

synopsis: Kam Tin is home to people of many ethnicities, like a miniature United Nations. Chris moves there from the city with his wife Erica and their daughter, Wing Yan. As they adjust to their new life, they must also learn how to get along with neighbours of different ethnicities. Chris starts a business with an Indian partner, though Erica has little faith in it. Wing Yan befriends an African asylum seeker, sparking gossip. Haunted by unpleasant past experiences, Erica carries racial stereotypes, growing increasingly anxious and unsettled as tensions rise… The film has been selected for the main competition section - FIRST International Film Festival (Xining)

synopsis_lang.en: Kam Tin is home to people of many ethnicities, like a miniature United Nations. Chris moves there from the city with his wife Erica and their daughter, Wing Yan. As they adjust to their new life, they must also learn how to get along with neighbours of different ethnicities. Chris starts a business with an Indian partner, though Erica has little faith in it. Wing Yan befriends an African asylum seeker, sparking gossip. Haunted by unpleasant past experiences, Erica carries racial stereotypes, growing increasingly anxious and unsettled as tensions rise… The film has been selected for the main competition section - FIRST International Film Festival (Xining)
synopsis_lang.zh_hk: 錦田聚居了不同族裔，就像個小聯合國。Chris一家三口從市區搬到錦田，在適應新生活之時，也需摸索如何跟不同族裔的居民相處。Chris跟印度人合資做生意，惜不被太太Erica看好；女兒穎恩跟來自非洲的尋求庇護者結成好友，卻惹來流言蜚語；Erica因過往不快經驗及對非華裔人士的成見， 對這一切只愈感焦慮和不安⋯⋯ 本片入選西寧FIRST 電影節主競賽單元

cast: Cheung Moon Yuen Kenneth, Yiyi Zhao, Tsang Wing Yam, Inderjeet Singh, Darius Kokou Agbeko Dzadu, Caro Chan, Deepmala KD,  Sze Wei
